item.title: COVID-19. How India fares Vs other countries?
item.description: This is a half baked attempt at analyzing the COVID-19 situation. Annotations and making sense of the graphs to follow soon. Rate of new infections New infections, India still in early stages of the spread Germany and Italy appear to be on a similar trajectory with respect to spread. (Deaths and recoveries might look quite different) China’s control of COVID-19 spread is surreal. The spread in India appears to way slower than other countries.

item.title: First snippet
item.description: This content is in snippets/first/index.md pwd

item.title: Hi! I am Sunil.
item.description: I am a Machine Learning practitioner who loves solving problem using data and telling stories about them. I prefer to build solutions that generalise and yet are as simple as possible. My toolkit: Programming Languages: R, Python, Processing Deep learning and GPU computing: Keras, TensorFlow Cloud: AWS EC2, AWS S3, Amazon SageMaker Visualization: Grammar of Graphics, ggplot, matplotlib Besides work, I love mountains, forests and FIFA, and football – in no particular order.

item.title: Projects
item.description: Nothing to see here… Move along!
